note: IB Diploma Programme Mathematics topic structure. Two courses: Analysis & Approaches (AA) and Applications & Interpretations (AI), each at SL and HL. Topic structure is public; detailed syllabus requires IB World School access. Verify against the current IB subject guides (first examinations 2021).

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Arithmetic and geometric sequences and series; sigma notation; applications; finite and infinite geometric series

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Laws of exponents and logarithms; change of base; solving exponential and logarithmic equations

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Binomial theorem; Pascal's triangle; combinations and permutations (HL: proof by induction, complex numbers)

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Complex number operations; modulus-argument form; De Moivre's theorem; roots of complex numbers

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Function notation; domain and range; inverse functions; composite functions; transformations of graphs

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Quadratic functions and equations; discriminant; rational functions; exponential and logarithmic functions

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Radian measure; unit circle; trig ratios; double angle and compound angle formulae; trig equations and graphs

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Vector algebra; dot and cross products; equations of lines and planes; intersections and angles in 3D

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Descriptive statistics; probability rules; conditional probability; Bayes' theorem (HL); Venn diagrams; tree diagrams

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Discrete and continuous distributions; binomial; normal; t-distribution; hypothesis testing; chi-squared test (HL)

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Limits and derivatives; differentiation rules (product, quotient, chain); tangent and normal lines; optimisation; kinematics

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.description: Definite and indefinite integration; area under and between curves; integration by substitution; volumes of revolution (HL)

topics.subject: Mathematics AA
topics.subtopicTitle: Maclaurin series and differential equations (HL only)
topics.description: Maclaurin series; first-order and second-order differential equations; Euler's method

topics.subject: Mathematics AI
topics.subtopicTitle: Arithmetic, geometric sequences, and financial maths
topics.description: Sequences and series; compound interest; amortisation; annuities; depreciation; approximations and errors

topics.subject: Mathematics AI
topics.description: Linear, quadratic, exponential, sinusoidal, and logistic models; regression analysis using GDC; piecewise functions

topics.subject: Mathematics AI
topics.description: Collecting and displaying data; measures of central tendency and spread; linear correlation; chi-squared test; t-test; ANOVA (HL)

topics.subject: Mathematics AI
topics.subtopicTitle: Differential and integral calculus for applications
topics.description: Differentiation for rates of change and optimisation; integration for areas and accumulated change; Euler's method and numerical methods (HL)
